---
title: "Data Science & Software Engineering"
listing:
  contents: projects.yml
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort: "order desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  grid-columns: 3
  image-height: "200px"
---

This my collection of curated content on **data science** and **software engineering**.

Select a category on the side to filter projects, or click a card to view the deployed application or notebook.
